mechanism_of_action: The mechanism of action of KS-2 is not clear yet. The result showed that KS-2 itself had no direct cytocidal effect against tumor cells in vitro. It may be explained by the activation of macrophage with or without interferon induced by KS-2.

toxicity_profile.cytotoxicity: not cytotoxic to tumor cells tested; acute LD50 was found to be extremely low, more than 12,500 mg/kg when administered orally to mice and 2,083 mg/kg after intraperitoneal injection.
